Careers

If you are passionate about fundraising and committed to making a positive impact with your expertise, we would love to hear from you!

Current employment opportunities will be posted here (below) and through social media, so make sure to follow us on Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn to be the first to know when we are hiring.

Our departments consist of Accounting and Administration, Fundraising, Events and Donor Relations, Marketing and Communications, and Information Technology. We have an enthusiastic team of staff and volunteers whose unique skills and experiences contribute to a dynamic and collaborative environment. We’re creative, flexible, innovative, and excited for the future… both for Peace Arch Hospital’s expansion and the possibilities for inspiring the healthiest community possible in our region.

Job Opportunities
Philanthropy Officer, Leadership Giving (16-17 Month Maternity Leave Contract)

 We are…

A dynamic fundraising organization committed to raising funds and awareness to enhance health and wellness in our community.
A passionate team of staff and volunteers that have worked together to raise nearly $300 million in the 38-year history of the Foundation.
An organization that is preparing for our next stage of growth and the launch of our next campaign project.

The Philanthropy Officer, Leadership Giving…

This
